_publications._publicationTitle: Nf1 mutation expands an EGFR-dependent peripheral nerve progenitor that confers neurofibroma tumorigenic potential.

_contextSnippet: Additionally, Nf1−/− sphere-forming cells expanded (7.7-fold increase) when cultured in EGF and bFGF at low concentration (0.2 ng/ml) as compared to wild type (2.3% sphere formation versus 0.3%)
details: Nf1−/− sphere-forming cells showed 7.7-fold increase expansion when cultured in low concentration EGF and bFGF (0.2 ng/ml) compared to wild type (2.3% vs 0.3% sphere formation)
